content:
🤖 AI Summary:

# Support Chat Summary

• **Customer's Problem:** Client needs two things: (1) API integration documentation for connecting to the system, and (2) a commercial quote for 50 licenses

• **What Was Tried:** AI agent offered to create a technical support ticket for API documentation and requested details about the integration system, data synchronization plans, and implementation timeline. Customer indicated the API question was resolved but now has a new sales requirement.

• **What Needs to Happen Next:** Transfer customer to a sales manager to prepare and discuss a commercial proposal/quote for 50 licenses. Customer explicitly requested to be connected with a manager for this purpose.

🤖 AI Summary:

# Support Chat Summary

• **Problem**: Customer unable to import contact data from Excel file - file uploads successfully but data doesn't appear in the system; also experiencing Error 500 when attempting to pay for subscription

• **Actions Taken**: AI agent provided troubleshooting steps (file format, size limits, encoding, access permissions); customer confirmed all recommendations were tried without success; support ticket TK-0003 created with High priority (P2) with 1-hour response time

• **Next Steps**: Technical team to investigate system logs and analyze import file; customer will receive notification when specialist contacts them; secondary issue (payment error 500) requires further troubleshooting - browser cache clearing was suggested but conversation was cut off

🤖 AI Summary:

# Support Chat Summary

• **Customer's Problem:** Customer requested to speak with a manager/supervisor after being told they have no open tickets.

• **What Was Tried:** AI agent informed customer that no open tickets exist and offered to help create a new ticket or assist with any issues.

• **What Needs to Happen Next:** Transfer customer to a human manager or supervisor as requested. The underlying issue causing the escalation request is unclear and requires further investigation by a human agent.
